title: Create and commit two Dev Department plugin worker files
job:
Create two worker files for the Development Department plugin. The types file already exists at plugins/dev-department/src/worker/types.ts — import from it.

1. Create plugins/dev-department/src/worker/state.ts:
Import all types from ./types. Create a StateStore class that uses Map<string, any> for storage. Implement these methods:
- generateId(): returns a UUID string
- createProject(data): creates DevProject, returns it
- getProject(id): returns DevProject or null
- updateProject(id, data): partial update, returns updated
- deleteProject(id): removes project
- listProjects(): returns all DevProjects
- createPhase(data): creates Phase, returns it
- getPhase(id): returns Phase or null
- getPhasesByProject(projectId): returns sorted by sortOrder
- updatePhase(id, data): partial update
- deletePhase(id): removes phase
- reorderPhases(projectId, phaseIds): updates sortOrder for each
- createSpec(data): creates Spec
- getSpecByPhase(phaseId): returns Spec or null
- updateSpec(id, data): partial update
- createPRD(data): creates PRD
- getPRDByPhase(phaseId): returns PRD or null
- updatePRD(id, data): partial update
- createConversationRef(data): creates ConversationReference
- getConversationRefs(scopeType, scopeId): returns filtered list
- updateConversationRef(id, data): partial update
- deleteConversationRef(id): removes
Export a singleton instance.

2. Create plugins/dev-department/src/worker/index.ts:
Re-export everything from ./types and ./state.

Commit both files.
